title: Beille Ceramic Stoneware Modern Dipped Coffee Cups 3pc Set, Assorted Colors

Beille Ceramic Stoneware Modern Dipped Coffee Cups 3pc Set, Assorted Colors

Calling all coffee drinkers! This lovely 3pc set of coffee cups holds a generous 11oz’s of your favorite beverage, suitable for coffee, tea, hot chocolate or any other hot or cold drink! A great everyday addition to any kitchen, the set is neutral in color, fresh and modern in design, durable and dishwasher safe. Made from highly durable ceramic stoneware and finished in a smooth semigloss glaze, the coffee cups set from Beille are weighty, will stand up to lots of wear and tear, and heat, in the kitchen, at the table or in the office.

The design of the coffee cups features fresh and complementary blue colorways, modern coffee lettering down the side of the coffee mug and a sturdy handle for comfortable gripping when sipping. These coffee cups also make a great choice for stocking or staging a kitchen with a coastal décor theme.

Key Features

  • 3PC COFFEE CUPS SET: Calling all coffee drinkers! This lovely 3pc set of coffee cups holds a generous 11oz’s of your favorite beverage, suitable for coffee, tea, hot chocolate or any other hot or cold drink! A great everyday addition to any kitchen, the set is neutral in color, fresh and modern in design, durable and dishwasher safe
  • COFFEE CUPS WITH MODERN DESIGN: The design of the coffee cups features fresh and complementary blue colorways, modern coffee lettering down the side of the coffee mug and a sturdy handle for comfortable gripping when sipping; makes a great option for stocking or staging a kitchen with coastal décor too!
  • DURABLE CERAMIC STONEWARE: Made from highly durable ceramic stoneware and finished in a smooth semigloss glaze, the coffee cups set from Beille are weighty, will stand up to lots of wear and tear, and heat, in the kitchen, at the table or in the office
  • DISHWASHER SAFE: No handwashing needed here! Easy to keep clean, all the coffee cups in this set are dishwasher safe and can withstand high temperature heat
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4 x 3.25 inches; Total Set Weight: 2.40lbs; Color: Assorted Cool Colors (Pastel Blue, Sea Blue and Grey Blue) or Assorted Warm Colors (Yellow, Red, Light Pink)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BCMUG3PCWRM
  • UPC: 810058485199
  • Color: Warm
  • Size: 3pc

And, last but not least: dorm room essentials! This 3pc coffee cups set would also make a great gift for kids heading off to college or university, who will no doubt, be drinking lots of coffee! Whether students are bunking solo or with roommates, the coffee cups are easy to clean, while the set is easy to systematize by color for different housemates if needed. NOTE: No handwashing needed here! Easy to keep clean, the coffee cups are all dishwasher safe.

Material: Ceramic Stoneware

Coffee Mugs Dimensions: 4 x 3.25 inches

Total Product Weight: 2.40lbs
